title: citrus retusa
intro: Citrus retusa, also known as the calamansi or Philippine lime, is a small, evergreen tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is a member of the Rutaceae family and is widely used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Citrus retusa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Citrus retusa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including tea, juice, and oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its benefits.
